mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_mail_task ( receiver_user_id, receiver_email, notification_type, mail_subject, mail_content, related_biz_type, related_biz_id, dispatch_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_fail_reason, send_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{receiverUserId}, #{receiverEmail}, #{notificationType}, #{mailSubject}, #{mailContent}, #{relatedBizType}, #{relatedBizId}, #{dispatchStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{lastFailReason}, #{sendTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT mail_task_id, receiver_user_id, receiver_email, notification_type, mail_subject, mail_content, related_biz_type, related_biz_id, dispatch_status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_fail_reason, send_time, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM notification_mail_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND dispatch_status = #{dispatchStatus} AND next_retry_time <= #{currentTime} ORDER BY next_retry_time ASC, mail_task_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_mail_task SET dispatch_status = 'SENT', send_time = #{sendTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE mail_task_id = #{mailTaskId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE notification_mail_task SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_fail_reason = #{lastFailReason}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE mail_task_id = #{mailTaskId} AND deleted = 0 AND dispatch_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE notification_mail_task SET dispatch_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_fail_reason = #{lastFailReason}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE mail_task_id = #{mailTaskId} AND deleted = 0 AND dispatch_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification_mail_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND dispatch_status = #{dispatchStatus}
